originalTitle: Firefox is working on a rounded redesign with easy-to-find controls for privacy and AI
summary: Firefox is getting a drastic visual overhaul with a redesigned Settings section that will make it easier to find and use privacy settings, including the switch for turning off all present and future AI features. Mozilla calls the redesign "Project Nova" and plans to begin rolling it out later this year. It features rounded UI […]
content: Firefox is getting a drastic visual overhaul with a redesigned Settings section that will make it easier to find and use privacy settings, including the switch for turning off all present and future AI features. Mozilla calls the redesign “Project Nova” and plans to begin rolling it out later this year. It features rounded UI elements throughout, including bubble-like tabs, along with a refreshed, fire-inspired color palette. Mozilla says it’s also updating icons so they’re more visually consistent across light and dark themes.  [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/firefox-project-nova-redesign-tab-toolbar.png?quality=90&strip=all] [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot-2026-05-21-at-2.41.36PM.png?quality=90&strip=all] Firefox’s AI features and models aren’t downloaded to your computer unless you choose to use them, even if you haven’t turned on the complete block in the settings. But if you do have any installed, it’s already easier to see which ones, and how much space they’re taking up, compared to Google Chrome’s contentious 4GB download. While the redesign isn’t coming until later this year, Mozilla also announced a new feature on Thursday that’s available now: support for the Web Serial API. As Mozilla notes: “For example, websites can control devices or deliver firmware without requiring native applications or installers.” The new API is part of Firefox 151, which was released this week and also includes an updated design for the Firefox Home page, new wallpapers, and the option to merge multiple PDFs together in the browser’s PDF viewer.  [Image: https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot-2026-05-21-at-3.47.22PM.png?quality=90&strip=all] On the productivity side, the new design will bring back Firefox’s compact mode, which condenses browser controls like the forward and backward buttons. The redesign will also make it easier to access tab groups, split view, and vertical tabs.  Project Nova will also include more customization, starting with new wallpapers and themes. The new color themes will apply to the whole browser window and have light and dark modes, similar to Chrome’s color themes. Mozilla’s blog post says it’s also “exploring” controls for the shape of tabs and other UI elements.
chineseTitle: Firefox 正在进行全面的重新设计，提供易于找到的隐私和 AI 控件
chineseSummary: Firefox 正在进行彻底的视觉改革，重新设计了“设置”部分，这将使查找和使用隐私设置变得更加容易，包括用于关闭所有当前和未来人工智能功能的开关。 Mozilla 将重新设计称为“Project Nova”，并计划在今年晚些时候开始推出。它具有圆形用户界面 [...]
chineseContent: Firefox 正在进行彻底的视觉改革，重新设计了“设置”部分，这将使查找和使用隐私设置变得更加容易，包括用于关闭所有当前和未来人工智能功能的开关。 Mozilla 将重新设计称为“Project Nova”，并计划在今年晚些时候开始推出。它始终具有圆形的 UI 元素，包括气泡状选项卡，以及焕然一新的、受火启发的调色板。 Mozilla 表示，它还在更新图标，以便它们在浅色和深色主题上在视觉上更加一致。  [图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/firefox-project-nova-redesign-tab-toolbar.png?quality=90&strip=all] [图片： https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot-2026-05-21-at-2.41.36PM.png?quality=90&strip=all] Firefox 的 AI 功能和模型不会下载到您的计算机，除非您选择使用它们，即使您没有在设置中打开完整的阻止功能。但如果你确实安装了任何软件，与 Google Chrome 备受争议的 4GB 下载相比，你可以更容易地看到哪些软件以及它们占用了多少空间。虽然重新设计要到今年晚些时候才会推出，但 Mozilla 还在周四宣布了一项现已推出的新功能：支持 Web Serial API。正如 Mozilla 指出的那样：“例如，网站可以控制设备或提供固件，而无需本机应用程序或安装程序。”新的 API 是本周发布的 Firefox 151 的一部分，还包括 Firefox 主页的更新设计、新壁纸以及在浏览器的 PDF 查看器中将多个 PDF 合并在一起的选项。  [图片：https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/05/Screenshot-2026-05-21-at-3.47.22PM.png?quality=90&strip=all]
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
